recommendations.title: Nothing to Hide
recommendations.overview: To spice up a dinner party, old friends agree to share every private message that pops up on their phones -- with disastrous results.

recommendations.title: French Lover
recommendations.overview: When a jaded actor meets a down-on-her-luck waitress in Paris, their unexpected love story begins — but will it survive the glare of the spotlight?

recommendations.title: The Finishers

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

recommendations.title: Lovers
recommendations.overview: Set in Paris the story follows Lisa, who, while on vacation with her husband, rekindles a passionate affair with her ex-boyfriend. But that may lead to a murder.
